import React from 'react' import { Col, Container, Row } from 'react-bootstrap'; import { useTypewriter, Cursor } from "react-simple-typewriter"; import headerImg from "../assets/img/U.jpg"; function Content() { const [typeEffect] = useTypewriter({ words: ["Web Developer", "App Developer", "Berozgar"], loop: {}, typeSpeed: 100, deleteSpeed: 60, }) return (

Welcome to my Portfolio,

I'm Alankrit Gupta, {typeEffect=='A'|'Ap'|'App'|' '|'D'|'e'|'v'|'e'|'l'|'o'|'p'|'e'|'r'?'an ':'a '}{typeEffect}

Lorem ipsum dolor, sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Ullam, expedita. Laboriosam inventore facere repudiandae soluta! Dicta animi sint beatae, unde voluptate voluptatem sit, distinctio, magnam est quasi officia optio explicabo?
) } export default Content
